channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Pilot Who Crashed Plane Into Beijing Building Wrote About Suicide In Diary

media:content.media:description: The plane crash raised questions about aviation safety in tightly secured Beijing.

item.description: The pilot -- surnamed Liu -- was divorced, lived alone in Beijing and "had long suffered from insomnia and anxiety, and his diary contained multiple references to 'ending his life'", the capital's Chaoyang district government said in a statement.
item.content:encoded: The pilot -- surnamed Liu -- was divorced, lived alone in Beijing and "had long suffered from insomnia and anxiety, and his diary contained multiple references to 'ending his life'", the capital's Chaoyang district government said in a statement.

item.title: China's New Ethnic Unity Law Takes Effect Amid Global Rights Criticism

media:content.media:description: China's new ethnic unity law sparks international criticism over Uyghur and Tibetan minority rights

item.description: China's new ethnic unity law takes effect despite UN, Taiwan, and US criticism over minority rights and its overseas enforcement clause.
item.content:encoded: China's new ethnic unity law takes effect despite UN, Taiwan, and US criticism over minority rights and its overseas enforcement clause.

item.title: Hope To Find Survivors Fades As Venezuela Quake Death Count Nears 2,300

media:content.media:description: Rescue workers search rubble in La Guaira, Venezuela, a week after twin earthquakes killed nearly 2,300.

item.description: Venezuela's death toll hits 2,295 with 50,000 still missing a week after twin quakes, as survivors battle food shortages and disease fears
item.content:encoded: Venezuela's death toll hits 2,295 with 50,000 still missing a week after twin quakes, as survivors battle food shortages and disease fears

item.title: India-Japan Summit 2026 LIVE: Japan, India Working Together To Promote Industry In Northeast: Piyush Goyal
item.description: India-Japan Summit 2026 LIVE News Updates: The event today will feature prominent voices including Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal, Daikin India Chairman and Managing Director Kanwal Jeet Jawa, India's Ambassador to Japan Nagma Mallick and many others
item.content:encoded: India-Japan Summit 2026 LIVE News Updates: The event today will feature prominent voices including Union Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal, Daikin India Chairman and Managing Director Kanwal Jeet Jawa, India's Ambassador to Japan Nagma Mallick and many others

item.title: Who Is Vadym Yermolaiev? Sanctioned Ukrainian Tycoon Wounded In Monaco Parcel Bomb Attack

media:content.media:description: Yermolaiev built his fortune in Dnipro's construction sector

item.description: Kyiv alleges the 58-year-old maintained an alcohol business in annexed Crimea -- paying taxes to Russia even after it invaded Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: Kyiv alleges the 58-year-old maintained an alcohol business in annexed Crimea -- paying taxes to Russia even after it invaded Ukraine.

item.title: TikTok Settles Social Media Addiction Lawsuit With US Teen Ahead Of Trial

media:content.media:description: TikTok Reaches Settlement in Landmark Social Media Addiction Case

item.description: Accused of using features like infinite scroll to hook kids, TikTok chose to settle, following a previous $27 million school district payout.
item.content:encoded: Accused of using features like infinite scroll to hook kids, TikTok chose to settle, following a previous $27 million school district payout.

item.title: Piyush Goyal Recalls "Nightmare" His Team Faced During US-India Trade Talks

media:content.media:description: Piyush Goyal has said India-US Trade deal is fair and equitable

item.description: Goyal noted that all the different elements -- whether it's the concessions in different goods or breaking down non-tariff barriers-- have been largely finalised.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1121573/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Goyal noted that all the different elements -- whether it's the concessions in different goods or breaking down non-tariff barriers-- have been largely finalised.

item.title: 8 Thai Monks Killed, 10 Injured As Child Drives Mini Truck Into Procession

media:content.media:description: Five monks died at the scene and three more later died in hospital.

item.description: Police said the boy had taken his parents' pickup truck without permission before losing control of the vehicle and crashing into the monks.
item.content:encoded: Police said the boy had taken his parents' pickup truck without permission before losing control of the vehicle and crashing into the monks.

item.title: US Lifts Export Ban On Anthropic's Fable 5, Gives Limited Access To Mythos 5

media:content.media:description: US Government Lifts Ban on Anthropic Fable 5 AI Model

item.description: The US government lifted restrictions on Anthropic's advanced AI models, resolving a safety and political standoff regarding the technology.
item.content:encoded: The US government lifted restrictions on Anthropic's advanced AI models, resolving a safety and political standoff regarding the technology.

item.title: Passenger Caught Hiding Smoke Grenade In Peanut Butter Jar At US Airport

media:content.media:description: Passenger detained after TSA discovers smoke grenade inside a peanut butter jar in checked bag.

item.description: Live smoke grenade found concealed in a peanut butter jar during luggage screening at the Indianapolis airport.
item.content:encoded: Live smoke grenade found concealed in a peanut butter jar during luggage screening at the Indianapolis airport.

item.title: China's Critical Minerals Dominance A Threat To India, Japan? What Minister Told NDTV

media:content.media:description: Piyush Goyal was speaking at NDTV's 'Indo-Japan Strategic Dialogue'

item.description: Piyush Goyal recalled that during the COVID-19 pandemic, China had shut its border, causing "significant difficulty" to the supply chains around the world.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1121485/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Piyush Goyal recalled that during the COVID-19 pandemic, China had shut its border, causing "significant difficulty" to the supply chains around the world.

item.title: 5 Hospitalised After Bear Spray Discharged Accidentally At Japan Post Office

media:content.media:description: At least five people have been killed by bears in Japan since April 1 (Representational)

item.description: Amid a historic surge in deadly bear attacks across Japan, five post office visitors required hospital treatment after a canister accidentally discharged.
item.content:encoded: Amid a historic surge in deadly bear attacks across Japan, five post office visitors required hospital treatment after a canister accidentally discharged.

item.title: Microsoft, Tata Among Firms Planning India-Southeast Asia Submarine Cable

media:content.media:description: Undersea cable route linking India, Singapore and Malaysia for AI and cloud data centers

item.description: Microsoft, Lightstorm and telecom majors plan a 3,600 km undersea cable linking India, Singapore and Malaysia to power AI and cloud growth by 2029
item.content:encoded: Microsoft, Lightstorm and telecom majors plan a 3,600 km undersea cable linking India, Singapore and Malaysia to power AI and cloud growth by 2029

item.title: Trump Taps Harvard Astronomer Avi Loeb To Lead His New UFO Council

media:content.media:description: Avi Loeb's team will report to a new panel focused on UFOs

item.description: Led by Avi Loeb, a new Trump administration scientific council is reviewing over 50 Pentagon records to evaluate UAP security risks.
item.content:encoded: Led by Avi Loeb, a new Trump administration scientific council is reviewing over 50 Pentagon records to evaluate UAP security risks.

item.title: India-Bound Oil Tanker Survives Gunfire Near Hormuz, Reaches Odisha Port

media:content.media:description: The vessel is believed to have carried around 22 crew members

item.description: To ensure the safety of the vessel and its crew, the ship reportedly altered its route after the incident and continued its voyage towards the Indian coast without any further security breach.
item.content:encoded: To ensure the safety of the vessel and its crew, the ship reportedly altered its route after the incident and continued its voyage towards the Indian coast without any further security breach.

item.title: Heat Dome Brings Extreme Temperatures To US Ahead Of July 4 Celebrations

media:content.media:description: A heat dome high-pressure systems above a region that trap heat has been smothering US

item.description: Dangerous 100-degree Fahrenheit heat domes trigger health warnings and open cooling centers across the Northeast during July 4th celebrations.
item.content:encoded: Dangerous 100-degree Fahrenheit heat domes trigger health warnings and open cooling centers across the Northeast during July 4th celebrations.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why India Should Be Very, Very Alarmed About China's Teesta Move In Bangladesh
item.description: China had been angling for the project for years but was thwarted by the Hasina government's caution. That's no more the case now.
item.content:encoded: China had been angling for the project for years but was thwarted by the Hasina government's caution. That's no more the case now.

item.title: Crypto, Golf Clubs, Watches: How Trump Built $1 Billion Fortune Last Year

media:content.media:description: World Liberty Financial crypto tokens linked to Trump's $1.2 billion disclosed earnings

item.description: Trump's financial disclosure reveals $1.2 billion in crypto earnings last year, surpassing his real estate empire built over decades
item.content:encoded: Trump's financial disclosure reveals $1.2 billion in crypto earnings last year, surpassing his real estate empire built over decades

item.title: "Reading Too Much Into It...": At NDTV's Indo-Japan Summit, Piyush Goyal On US' Pacific Command Move
item.description: Union Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal said the US dropping India from its Indo-Pacific Command name should not be overinterpreted.
item.content:encoded: Union Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal said the US dropping India from its Indo-Pacific Command name should not be overinterpreted.

item.title: Searching For Suu Kyi In Myanmar's Capital Of Confusion

media:content.media:description: Aung San Suu Kyi was jailed on charges rights groups decry as fabrications.

item.description: Myanmar's Suu Kyi is under house arrest in Naypyidaw, but even generals don't know her exact location in the secretive, maze-like capital
item.content:encoded: Myanmar's Suu Kyi is under house arrest in Naypyidaw, but even generals don't know her exact location in the secretive, maze-like capital
